description: From the brand Previous page At Unique Party , we are committed to providing high-quality products at cost-effective prices and our ever-evolving catalogue of party supplies includes both classic and on-trend party items including balloons, paper products, piñatas, party favours, and more! All these things combined give us a Unique edge over the competition. Check Out Our Store For More! Visit the store How did we get our start? Eb Novak started Unique Party in 1961, at the age of 23, in the basement of a warehouse and worked around the clock to build a successful business from the ground up. What makes our products unique? Every year we create dozens of new ensembles so that we are always up to date on the latest trends. We have the top licensed characters, such as Harry Potter, Batman, and LOL Surprise to name a few. Why we love what we do? As a family-owned business since day one, we take pride in treating every customer as a member of our family. Next page
